problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
